layout_description: The invoice has a header area at the top with fields for invoice number, date, currency, payment terms, incoterms, and freight. Below this, there are sections for the exporter and importer, each with their respective names and addresses. The main body of the invoice contains a table with columns for item number, part number, description, quantity, unit of measure, unit price, RIC, and origin. The table is positioned in the middle of the page and is a single table. Tax details are included inline per row within the table. The footer area includes totals and possibly signatures, stamps, or notes, though these are not explicitly detailed in the provided layout. The invoice has a structured layout with borders around the table and possibly a logo at the top.
